headline: Find the Quiet.
Collect Gentle Moments.
hero.subheadline: Past the last train stop, four countryside wards still breathe slowly — cedar shade, tide hush, hearth glow, and highland breeze. Collect their gentle spirits, build thoughtful decks, and wander a calm market without breaking the stillness.

paragraphs: The old balance of the countryside is thinning. A restless current called the Haru-kaze carries too many hurried footsteps through places that once knew only stillness, eroding the Shizukesa — the sacred quiet that lets moss grow, tides breathe, and lanterns glow at their own pace.

As noise presses inward, gentle ward spirits grow unsettled. Deck keepers must not only win their matches, but tend these fading pockets of calm before the last cedar shade and tide-pool mirror vanish into ordinary rush.

leaderboard: Seasonal ladder — ranked standings across the four wards.
